decision.archive_summary: Case codex:vscode:019da152-4841-76f2-adc4-b01a85d15a88 is still active. Earlier setup turns established that the user's current default editor was updated from Vim to Zed, and the shadow mode detour was only a temporary side topic. By t12, the assistant had already summarized the important result for this case: answer correctness was verified ('Zed'), but GC still did not apply because relation stayed continue and guard_reason was not_enough_evictions.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn ('继续') continues the same active case discussion, so relation=continue. The next turn only needs the current case result summary plus the durable fact that the user's current default editor is Zed. The old Vim fact is superseded, the shadow mode branch is resolved and irrelevant, and the repeated prompt-driving turns are safe to evict. t10 is redundant because t12 preserves the newer summary of the same outcome. Pin t3 so the updated editor fact survives compactly even if its raw turn leaves the prompt.
